extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports against-vs-by rows separately: criminal proceedings against the Company (Nil), Promoters (1), and Directors (4) were counted, while the Company's 182 and the separate 82 cheque-bounce complaints filed by the Company were excluded as 'By' matters; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company (2) were counted separately, and tax proceedings against the Company (21) were counted separately from regulatory matters. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹224.29 million and against Subsidiaries is Nil; promoter and director amounts, and all 'By' amounts, were excluded, producing ₹22.429 crore after conversion. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹381.13 million as at December 31, 2024, converted to ₹38.113 crore rather than re-summing line items. The only customer concentration disclosure is segment-level top-10 revenue (Brand sales, Institutional sales and Exports), so no company-wide top-5 or top-10 percentage is extracted; the disclosed percentages use consolidated gross revenue from operations and include Fiscal 2024 as the latest full fiscal period. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
